75366.subject: 📈 Markets surge as Bitcoin breaks $61K
75366.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $61,260 (4.8%) | **ETH** $1,652 (5.4%) | **SOL** $82 (10.1%)

* Robinhood surges [over 10%](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/HOOD/) after multiple [announcements](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2072431857023725783?s=20) including launching its own blockchain — dYdX rebrands to Arcus and [launches](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2072398770017304728?s=20)[ DEX](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2072398770017304728?s=20) product on the Robinhood chain

* Claude usage limits are [reset](https://x.com/ClaudeDevs/status/2072429181565288665?s=20) as Fable 5 launches

* OpenAI considers giving the US government [5% stake](https://x.com/solidintel_x/status/2072566027339079711?s=20) in company

* Metaplanet [buys $170M](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2072592211854717210?s=20) worth of Bitcoin — Bitcoin briefly [reclaims $61K](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2072446246153843164?s=20)

* Micron [falls below](https://x.com/Barchart/status/2072470238331871688?s=20) 20 day moving average for the first time in 3 months — Will [invest $250M](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2072357550280847492?s=20) into Trump accounts

* META posts [massive gains](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2072330673445036119?s=20) on AI compute pivot

* Binance stock trading reaches over [$1B AUM](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2072399890013954400?s=20)

* Bitcoin ETFs continue outflow streak [shedding $295M](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2072558071612854345?s=20) yesterday

* Daily Binance retail inflows hit [record low](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2072591138566132171?s=20)

* X is allocating [$1M in rewards](https://x.com/WhaleInsider/status/2072437270733369433?s=20) to streamers

* Venice closes [$65M equity raise](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2072326632245748163?s=20) at a $1B valuation

* Cloudflare launches [stablecoin monetization gateway](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2072478819911606431?s=20)

* Machi Big Brother continues to [sell Bored Apes](https://x.com/lookonchain/status/2072586936515236049?s=20)

* Binance secures [approval](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2072591138566132171?s=20) to operate in the Phillippenes

———————————————————————————


———

You are reading

Fear and Greed has ticked up to
21
(Fear)
and BTC is recovering at
$61K
this morning. The recovery was led by Solana hitting a one-month
high above $77 after a major SOL treasury firm disclosed its
largest quarterly purchase, pulling broader market sentiment
slightly higher to open July.

Bitcoin posted its worst June in years. But the first two days
of Q3 tell a different story. A new Ethereum nonprofit just
launched. A DeFi token just got a bold price target from Standard
Chartered. And a Trump-linked mining company just approved a
reverse stock split to keep its Nasdaq listing.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

A Solana Treasury Firm Just Hit a One-Month High

Forward Industries disclosed on July 1 it purchased more than
500,000 SOL in its fiscal third quarter, lifting total holdings
to 7.55 million SOL. Shares jumped more than 17% as Solana hit a
one-month high above $77.

The company reported 36% annualized growth in SOL per fully
diluted share over the quarter.

How does Forward Industries decide when to issue shares versus
when to buy them back?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/h6uqxpl39XO48eTgdBpqQg~~/AAQRxRA~/tbHZfwMRHQo1SUmOxUABvp_oslJFE33UXzCRCZTgSBiw1DA2hFU7ui7nh-9CCpSgJdjCBYWNlefJ97c_ti2IcIA_9qwq1fqYdJ1w1nxsjkOczqcNG7b2PFD6_OgysZDMlCffV90mkQBovwxskbulfoG299Dnb4VQT7amC_Gt7p_q4IDHsH6Gx0Uxjnyh7jKxLD3rNLOZNYXR9pqeZ84ivTWdrw42yPVhlJsLIh6lXgw~ )
